response_params.name: commissionRates.taker

response_params.name: brokered

response_params.name: preventSor

request_params.name: bizType
request_params.description: Business type filter (e.g. deposit , withdraw , trade_out ).

request_params.name: after
request_params.description: Return records created after this bill ID.

request_params.name: before
request_params.description: Return records created before this bill ID.

request_params.name: limit

response_params.name: brokered

response_params.name: -> depositEnable
response_params.description: Whether deposits via this network are enabled.

response_params.name: -> withdrawEnable
response_params.description: Whether withdrawals via this network are enabled.

response_params.name: -> depositDust
response_params.description: Minimum deposit amount that will be credited.

response_params.name: -> depositDesc / withdrawDesc
response_params.description: Optional status messages when deposits/withdrawals are disabled.

request_params.name: symbol

response_params.name: -> marketFallbackPriceRatio

response_params.description: Whether the symbol is marked as âhotâ.

request_params.name: symbol

request_params.description: Multiple trading pairs. Accepts comma-separated values or a JSON array.

response_params.name: lowPrice

response_params.name: volume
response_params.description: Base asset volume in the last 24 hours.

response_params.name: quoteVolume

response_params.description: First trade timestamp in the 24h window (ms).

response_params.name: closeTime

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Single trading pair (mutually exclusive with symbols ).

request_params.description: Multiple trading pairs. Accepts comma-separated values or a JSON array.

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Number of depth entries. Supported values: 15 , 200 . Default 15 .

response_params.name: bids
response_params.description: Bid depth entries formatted as [price, quantity] .

response_params.name: asks
response_params.description: Ask depth entries formatted as [price, quantity] .

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Single trading pair (mutually exclusive with symbols ).

request_params.name: symbols
request_params.description: Multiple trading pairs. Accepts comma-separated values or a JSON array.

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Number of trades to return. Range 1 â 1000 , default 100 .

response_params.name: isBuyerMaker
response_params.description: true if the buyer was the maker side.

response_params.name: isBestMatch
response_params.description: true if the trade matched the best price level.

request_params.name: orderIds
request_params.description: Order IDs to cancel. Required when origClientOrderIds is empty.

request_params.name: origClientOrderIds
request_params.description: Client order IDs to cancel. Required when orderIds is empty.

response_params.name: -> errorCode
response_params.description: Error code when the order failed.

response_params.name: -> errorMsg
response_params.description: Error message when the order failed.

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: Order ID to cancel. Required when origClientOrderId is not supplied.

request_params.name: origClientOrderId
request_params.description: Client order ID to cancel. Required when orderId is not supplied.

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair whose open orders should be cancelled.

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End time in milliseconds. Must be greater than or equal to startTime .

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Number of records per page (default 100, maximum 1000).

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: Order ID. Required when origClientOrderId is not supplied.

request_params.name: origClientOrderId
request_params.description: Client order ID. Required when orderId is not supplied.

request_params.name: side
request_params.description: Order side. Supported values: BUY , SELL .

request_params.name: type
request_params.description: Order type. Supported values: LIMIT , MARKET .

request_params.name: timeInForce
request_params.description: Time-in-force policy. Required when type = LIMIT . Supported values: GTC , IOC , FOK .

request_params.name: price
request_params.description: Limit price. Required when type = LIMIT .

request_params.name: newClientOrderId
request_params.description: Client-defined order ID (if omitted, the system assigns one). If an active order already uses the same newClientOrderId , the API returns success but does not create a duplicate order.

response_params.name: orderId
response_params.description: Order ID generated by the system.

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End time (ms). Must be â¥ startTime .

response_params.name: isBuyer
response_params.description: Whether the user was the buyer.

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Filter by trading pair. If omitted, returns open orders for all symbols.

response_params.name: isWorking
response_params.description: Whether the order is currently working.

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: Optional end time (UTC, format yyyy-MM-dd , defaults to current if absent)
